public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as canon-keeper.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Speaks with ritual calm and practiced reassurance, but watches closely for signs of spiritual or civic disturbance. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a canon-keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of canon-keeper in and around Sunlit Plaza, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sunlit Plaza workable through the obligations of canon-keeper while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Sunlit Plaza, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of canon-keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kest Stone needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Sunlit Plaza.
Kest Stone may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Kest Stone immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sunlit Plaza: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
